title: lycopus europaeus var. menthifolius
intro: Lycopus europaeus var. menthifolius, also known as European water mint or peppermint-leaved water mint, is a perennial herb belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae). It is valued for its medicinal properties, including its ability to ease digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial and antispasmodic effects. The plant's health benefits include relief from nausea, indigestion, and irritable bowel syndrome, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve respiratory function. Lycopus europaeus var. menthifolius can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and its leaves and stems can be used in cooking and traditional medicine.
